name: types-str2bool

metadata.name: types-str2bool
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License

documentation:
## Typing stubs for str2bool

This is a [PEP 561](https://peps.python.org/pep-0561/)
type stub package for the [`str2bool`](https://github.com/symonsoft/str2bool) package.
It can be used by type-checking tools like
[mypy](https://github.com/python/mypy/),
[pyright](https://github.com/microsoft/pyright),
[pytype](https://github.com/google/pytype/),
PyCharm, etc. to check code that uses
`str2bool`.

This version of `types-str2bool` aims to provide accurate annotations
for `str2bool==1.1`.
The source for this package can be found at
https://github.com/python/typeshed/tree/main/stubs/str2bool. All fixes for
types and metadata should be contributed there.

See https://github.com/python/typeshed/blob/main/README.md for more details.
This package was generated from typeshed commit `0fc33ace4772bca6e65f8c9bb3420944b872ac8a` and was tested
with mypy 1.10.1, pyright 1.1.370, and
pytype 2024.4.11.
